raw_consumer_statement:
XX/XX/year> NOTED A CITIBANK CHARGE OF {$730.00} TO XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX TN XX/XX/year> TALKED TO HOTEL CLERK WHO SAID I WAS ONLY CHARGED {$110.00} FOR ONE NIGHT STAY. I WAS NEVER CHARGED AN ADDITIONAL {$730.00} XXXX CONTACTED CITIBANK FRAUD DIVISION NUMEROUS TIMES TO DISPUTE {$730.00} CHARGE, PROVIDE INFORMATION THAT THE STAFF AND MANAGER AT XXXX STATED THERE WAS NEVER A CHARGE FOR {$730.00} MADE. 

XX/XX/year> RECEIVED LETTER FROM FRAUD DIVIDIOSN STATING MY DISPUTE IS CLOSED AND I AM RESPONSIBLE FOR THE {$730.00} CHARGE TO XXXX. THEY CLAIMED THEIR WAS NO FRAUDULENT ACTIVITY.
